name: WF1 — Bot Telegram Horizons v2.1 (Health Tracking Fixed)

parameters.jsCode: // === /aide === const chatId = $input.first().json.chatId; const text = `🧭 COMMANDES HORIZONS v2.1 📅 Agenda /jour — Résumé agenda du jour /event — Créer un événement 📋 Organisation /audit — Auditer une activité /bilan — Bilan hebdomadaire 💪 Tracking Santé /sport [min] — Logger séance sport /poids [kg] — Logger le poids /eau [L] — Logger hydratation 🏆 Gamification /victoire [texte] — Logger une victoire ℹ️ /aide — Ce message`; return [{ json: { chatId, text, parse_mode: 'HTML' } }];

options.timeMin: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date(); const day = d.getDay(); const diff = d.getDate() - day + (day === 0 ? -6 : 1); const mon = new Date(d.setDate(diff)); mon.setHours(0,0,0,0); return mon.toISOString(); })() }}
options.timeMax: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date(); const day = d.getDay(); const diff = d.getDate() - day + (day === 0 ? 0 : 7); const sun = new Date(d.setDate(diff)); sun.setHours(23,59,59,999); return sun.toISOString(); })() }}
